title: phlomis herba-venti subsp. urmiensis
intro: Phlomis herba-venti subsp. urmiensis, also known as Phlomis urmiensis, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, native to Iran. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Phlomis urmiensis include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Phlomis urmiensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
